buildName: CLIENT REPORT PUBLISH SYNC + TIMESTAMP FIX
features: Synced Client Reports with the same published report/archive source used by Dispatch Report Archive
Client Reports now prefers published_at, released_at, and archive publishedAt timestamps before patrol/request timestamps
Client Reports now sorts by Published On newest first
Client report table header changed from Date & Time to Published On
Client report rows now show Published time and Patrol time separately
Client report preview now shows both Published On and Patrol Time
Client report download text and CSV export now include published and patrol timestamps
Recent Activity now uses published report time
Client Reports pagination now defaults to 10 rows and clearly shows total reports and page count
Preserved v3.0.70 Proof Review KPI/status cleanup
